name: Staff home branch must be set
description: All active staff must have a home branch assigned. Null branch blocks scheduling and reporting.
sqlExpression:
SELECT GS_Code, GS_FullName, GS_StartDate, GS_GB_HomeBranch
FROM GlbStaff
WHERE GS_GB_HomeBranch IS NULL
  AND IsActive = 1

name: Team code must reference active team
description: Staff team assignments must reference a currently active team record in GlbTeam.
sqlExpression:
SELECT et.GET_GS_Staff, et.GET_GT_Team, gt.GT_Name, gt.IsActive AS TeamIsActive
FROM GlbEmploymentTeam et
LEFT JOIN GlbTeam gt ON et.GET_GT_Team = gt.TeamID
WHERE gt.IsActive = 0
  OR gt.TeamID IS NULL

name: Contact email format valid
description: All email addresses must match the standard RFC 5321 format. Invalid formats cause bounce failures.
sqlExpression:
SELECT OC_Code, OC_Email
FROM OrgContact
WHERE OC_Email NOT LIKE '%_@_%.__%'
  AND IsActive = 1

name: No circular manager references
description: Manager chains must not contain cycles. Staff member A cannot be both a report and a manager of staff member B.
sqlExpression:
WITH chain AS (
  SELECT Staff, ManagerStaff, 1 AS depth
  FROM GlbStaffManager
  UNION ALL
  SELECT c.Staff, m.ManagerStaff, c.depth + 1
  FROM chain c
  JOIN GlbStaffManager m ON c.ManagerStaff = m.Staff
  WHERE c.depth < 50
)
SELECT DISTINCT Staff
FROM chain
WHERE Staff = ManagerStaff

name: Branch timezone code is recognised
description: Branch timezone must be a valid IANA timezone identifier (e.g. Australia/Sydney). Unrecognised codes break scheduling.
sqlExpression:
SELECT GB_Code, GB_FullName, GB_Timezone
FROM GlbBranch
WHERE GB_Timezone NOT IN (SELECT TimezoneCode FROM StmTimezone)
  AND IsActive = 1

name: Active orgs must have recent activity
description: Organisations marked as active should have had system activity in the last 24 months. Stale active records inflate reporting.
sqlExpression:
SELECT OH_Code, OH_FullName, OH_LastActivityDate
FROM OrgHeader
WHERE IsActive = 1
  AND OH_LastActivityDate < DATEADD(month, -24, GETDATE())

name: Registration expiry must be in the future
description: Active registration records must have a future expiry date. Expired-and-not-renewed registrations indicate a process failure.
sqlExpression:
SELECT OR_Code, OR_OrgCode, OR_ExpiryDate
FROM OrgRegistration
WHERE IsActive = 1
  AND OR_ExpiryDate < GETDATE()

name: Staff cost centre allocation sums to 100%
description: Where a staff member has multiple cost centre allocations, the percentages must total exactly 100%.
sqlExpression:
SELECT Staff, SUM(Percentage) AS TotalPct
FROM GlbStaffCostCentre
GROUP BY Staff
HAVING SUM(Percentage) != 100

name: Security role must have at least one member
description: All active security role definitions must have at least one active staff member assigned. Empty roles are likely stale.
sqlExpression:
SELECT gs.GS_RoleCode, gs.GS_Description
FROM GlbSecurity gs
WHERE gs.IsActive = 1
  AND NOT EXISTS (
    SELECT 1 FROM GlbStaffSecurity ss
    WHERE ss.GS_RoleCode = gs.GS_RoleCode
      AND ss.IsActive = 1
  )

name: Security group must have at least one active member
description: Every active security group must have at least one active staff member assigned.
sqlExpression:
SELECT g.GroupID, g.GG_Name
FROM GlbGroup g
WHERE g.GG_GroupType = 'Security'
  AND g.IsActive = 1
  AND NOT EXISTS (
    SELECT 1 FROM GlbGroupMember gm
    WHERE gm.GroupID = g.GroupID
      AND gm.IsActive = 1
  )

name: Release group must reference a valid release build
description: All active release groups must reference a ReleaseBuild record that exists and has not been superseded.
sqlExpression:
SELECT g.GroupID, g.GG_Name, g.GG_ReleaseBuild
FROM GlbGroup g
WHERE g.GG_GroupType = 'ReleaseGroup'
  AND g.IsActive = 1
  AND (
    g.GG_ReleaseBuild IS NULL
    OR NOT EXISTS (
      SELECT 1 FROM ReleaseBuild rb
      WHERE rb.BuildID = g.GG_ReleaseBuild
    )
  )

name: TriageNode must have a Product
sqlExpression:
SELECT IMT_SupportDescription
FROM IncidentTriage
WHERE IMT_Product IS ''
